hooks.command: echo '✓ Development workspace initialized. Using jj for version control.'
echo '✓ Task completed. Run tests if needed.'

autoMode.environment: Development workspace template with Rust and Python support, Nix Flakes for reproducible environments, prek hooks for code quality, and Jujutsu (jj) for version control
allow: Use jj (Jujutsu) for ALL version control operations - NEVER use git directly
Run tests via cargo test (Rust) or pytest (Python)
Use prek for code formatting and validation
Use nix develop to enter development environment
Format code automatically on edits via PostToolUse hooks
Read and modify project files as needed for tasks
Install dependencies via cargo (Rust) or uv pip (Python)

soft_deny.description: NEVER use git commands directly - use jj (Jujutsu) exclusively
soft_deny.reasoning: This template enforces Jujutsu workflow. Git commands are explicitly forbidden. Use 'jj' for all version control operations.

soft_deny.description: Do not delete files or directories without explicit confirmation
soft_deny.reasoning: Prevent accidental data loss in template users' projects

soft_deny.description: Do not modify Nix flake.lock without running nix flake update
soft_deny.reasoning: Lock file must be updated through proper Nix commands to maintain integrity

soft_deny.description: Do not bypass prek hooks with --no-verify flags
soft_deny.reasoning: prek hooks enforce code quality standards that should not be skipped
